site.title: Ishirahamwe mpuzamakungu ryitaho ivy'ugushikira abantu
site.tagline: Ibikenewe mu bijanye n'ugushikira amabanki y'abikorera utwabo
nav.label: Ubwa mbere
meta.home.description: IATF irahindura ibikenewe vy'ukuri mu bijanye n'ukworohereza abantu, ikabigira ububiko bw'amakuru ya bose.
meta.projects.description: Nusuzume imigambi y'ugushikira abantu bose yasohowe biciye kuri IATF.
meta.propose.description: Urashobora gusaba IATF ngo iguhe inyishu y'ico kibazo biciye kuri Internet, kuri e-mail canke kuri Discord.
meta.governance.description: Soma ingene IATF yemera imigambi, ingene icungera ububiko bwayo, n'ingene igumiza ibikorwa ku mugaragaro.
meta.join.description: Uburyo bwo kugira uruhara muri IATF: gutanga code, guhindura, kugerageza, canke kubungabunga umushinga.
meta.accessibility.description: Uburyo IATF ifise intumbero yo gutuma uru rubuga ruguma rushobora gukoreshwa be n'uburyo bwo gutanga amakuru ku bijanye n'intambamyi zibuza urwo rubuga gukoreshwa.
meta.transparency.description: Ivyandikano vya IATF biboneka ku mugaragaro: ingingo, imigambi, n'ibivuguruwe biguma vyuguruwe nk'ibisanzwe.
actions.emailProjects: Kurungikira ubutumwa mu gasanduku k'ubutumire bw'imigambi
registry.empty.title: Nta migambi irashirwa ahabona
registry.empty.body: IATF iriko irategura integuro yayo ya mbere y'igikorwa ca bose.
proposal.form.title: Kurungika igisabwa
proposal.form.body: Niwuzuze uru rupapuro rukurikira kugira urungikire IATF icegeranyo.
proposal.form.noscript: JavaScript irakenewe kugirango ukoreshe iyi fomu y'urubuga. Niba itaboneka, koresha email canke Discord.
proposal.form.runtimeUnavailable: Iyi fomu izofungura umukiriya wawe w'ubutumwa bwa e-mail mu kibanza cayo.
proposal.form.loadingProtection: Turiko turategura ugushikiriza amakuru ata nkomanzi...
proposal.form.ready: Igihe urungitse ivyo usavye, IATF izorema icegeranyo c'ivyinjizwa.
proposal.form.turnstileRequired: Turagusavye wuzuze igenzura ryo gukinga spam imbere yo kurungika.
proposal.form.turnstileExpired: Ugukingirwa spam kwaheze. Turagusavye usubire usuzume imbere yo kurungika.
proposal.form.turnstileError: Ugukingira Spam ntivyashoboye kwemezwa ubu nyene. Subira ugerageze.
proposal.form.turnstileTimeout: Ikiringo co gukinga spam cararangiye. Subira ugerageze.
proposal.form.requiredMessage: Turagusavye wuzuze ibibanza bisabwa imbere yo kurungika.
proposal.form.success: Igisabwa cawe cararonse kandi carazigamwe kugira ngo gisuzumwe.
proposal.form.successFollowUp: Niwasubira kuvugana n'ishirahamwe IATF ku bijanye n'ivyo wasavye, nushireho aderese iri aho hepfo.
proposal.form.errorGeneric: Habaye ikosa mu kurungika ivyo wasavye. Turagusavye usubire ugerageze. Nimba ikibazo kibandanije, koresha email.
project.detail.problemTitle: Ni ingorane iyihe iyo porogarama itorera umuti
project.detail.defaultLanguageNotes: Igisomwa c'icongereza gisanzwe, impinduro zishobora kwongerwa mu nyuma
footer.label: Imfuruka y'urubuga
footer.blurb: Ibikorwa bijanye n'ugushikira abantu bikwiye kworoha gutanguza, kworohera gusohora, no kworoshe kugumiza ku mugaragaro.
footer.source: Ivyerekeye ingingo ngenderwako zijanye n'ukworoherwa: [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/). Imyimenyerezo itangwa n'abakoresha ubuhinga bwo gufasha.
contact.label: Kumenya amakuru
translation.label: Uko igikorwa c'ubuhinduzi kimeze
translation.source: Ikirundi ni rwo rurimi rwemewe rwanditseko uru rupapuro.
translation.humanReviewed: Iyo mpinduro yasubiwemwo n'umuntu azi kuvuga neza.
translation.machineAssisted: Iyi mpinduro yashigikiwe n'imashini kandi ntiracagurwa n'umuntu azi kuvuga neza. Ivyiyumviro birahawe ikaze kuri GitHub.
translation.needsUpdate: Iyo mpinduro yarasubiwemwo imbere y'uko igisomwa c'icongereza giheruka gusubirwamwo, kandi vyoshobora gukenerwa ko ihindurwa.
